The '''Golan II Space Defense SpaceGun''', also known simply as the '''Golan II''', was the second [[Space station/Legends|space station]] in [[Golan Arms/Legends|Golan Arms]]' series of [[Golan space defense platform|space defense platforms]].

==Description==
[[File:40177_GS.png|thumb|left|A Golan II]]
The Golan II was the successor to the [[Golan I Space Defense Platform/Legends|original Golan platform]], which was judged to be insufficiently powerful to counter the threat of larger ships such as [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]]. Though the Golan II was based on the same general principles of design and function, the hull was built with a unique crossbeam structure to increase the station's durability, and more efficient [[Power generator/Legends|power generators]] allowed for a significant increase in [[Deflector shield/Legends|shield]] power.

The Golan II station was armed with 35 [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] batteries, 10 [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] launchers, and 8 [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] projectors. Like the Golan I, they also contained a hangar for small vessels, capable of launching at least 13 [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]].

==History==
[[File:Golan2_ISDs_X-wings.jpg|thumb|left|A Golan II SpaceGun with several [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]] and [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]]]]
Golan II platforms were used to defend more valuable targets, like the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] shipyards in the [[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi system]]. At the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilbringi]], it took the combined efforts of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and two [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Assault Frigate Mark I|assault frigates]] to neutralize one Golan II.

Despite their impressive firepower, even the Golan II eventually seemed inadequate, and they were succeeded by the [[Golan III Space Defense NovaGun]] stations.

During his leadership of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] had a Golan II refitted with a [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]], it would later be discovered during the [[Second Battle of Bilbringi]].

As late as the final stages of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Golan IIs were still in service.
